eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Chelan, WA; at 1:58 PM on JUL 11, 2026 Effective until 3:58 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
Chelan County Sheriff WILDFIRE WARNING, Level 2 Evacuation Advisory in Stemilt Creek  area. The affected area is Stemilt Creek Rd, Stemilt Creek Loop, and all side roads Clear Lake, Lilly Lake. Roads and evacuation routes can become blocked. If you do not leave now, you could be trapped, injured, or killed. For updates check Local Radio, TV or the Chelan County Emergency Management Web site and Face book.
Repeat.
Chelan County Sheriff WILDFIRE WARNING, Level 2 Evacuation Advisory in Stemilt Creek  area. The affected area is Stemilt Creek Rd, Stemilt Creek Loop, and all side roads Clear Lake, Lilly Lake. Roads and evacuation routes can become blocked. If you do not leave now, you could be trapped, injured, or killed. For updates check Local Radio, TV or the Chelan County Emergency Management Web site and Face book. Please monitor local radio stations and Chelan County Emergency Management Face book for updates.
